political_categories.name: Economy & Finance
political_categories.description: Policies affecting taxation, business regulation, financial markets, and corporate governance.
political_categories.conservative_view: Free market capitalism with minimal government interference, lower taxes, reduced regulation, fiscal responsibility, and competition-driven growth.
political_categories.liberal_view: Government regulation to ensure fairness, progressive taxation, consumer protections, and active measures to address income inequality.

subcategories.name: Taxes
subcategories.description: Income, corporate, and wealth tax policy.
subcategories.conservative_view: Lower taxes stimulate economic growth, reduce government size, and allow individuals to keep more of their earnings.
subcategories.liberal_view: Progressive taxation funds public services, reduces inequality, and ensures the wealthy pay their fair share.

subcategories.name: Business Regulation
subcategories.description: Antitrust, corporate rules, and market concentration.
subcategories.conservative_view: Minimal regulation allows innovation and competition to drive efficiency naturally; aggressive antitrust harms consumer benefits from scale.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong regulation prevents monopoly abuse, protects consumers, ensures fair competition, and breaks up concentrated corporate power.

subcategories.name: Financial Markets & Monetary Policy
subcategories.description: Securities regulation, central bank policy, crypto, inflation control.
subcategories.conservative_view: Light-touch regulation promotes capital formation; sound money and price stability protect savers.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong Wall Street oversight prevents systemic risk and fraud; monetary policy should support full employment.

political_categories.name: Budget & Appropriations
political_categories.description: Overall fiscal planning, debt, and major government spending bills.
political_categories.conservative_view: Fiscal responsibility, balanced budgets, debt reduction, limited government spending, and prioritizing essential functions only.
political_categories.liberal_view: Strategic government investment for economic growth, social programs, and infrastructure, with less concern for short-term deficits.

subcategories.name: Debt & Deficit
subcategories.conservative_view: Fiscal discipline requires debt reduction, spending cuts, and living within government means to avoid burdening future generations.
subcategories.liberal_view: Government debt is acceptable for productive investments; focus on economic growth and revenue enhancement over austerity.

subcategories.name: Appropriations
subcategories.conservative_view: Streamlined government funding focused on core functions; strict oversight to eliminate waste and unnecessary programs.
subcategories.liberal_view: Adequate funding for government services, social programs, and public investments even if requiring larger appropriations.

political_categories.name: Labor & Employment
political_categories.description: Worker protections, union rights, wages, and workplace conditions.
political_categories.conservative_view: Market forces should determine wages; right-to-work laws protect individual freedom; excessive labor regulation hurts job creation.
political_categories.liberal_view: Strong union protections, living wage laws, and robust workplace safety nets are essential for worker dignity and economic fairness.

subcategories.name: Unions & Collective Bargaining
subcategories.description: Organized labor rights, strike protections, right-to-work laws.
subcategories.conservative_view: Workers should not be forced to join unions or pay dues; right-to-work laws promote economic competitiveness.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong unions are essential to balance corporate power, negotiate fair wages, and protect worker rights.

subcategories.name: Wages & Benefits
subcategories.description: Minimum wage, paid leave, overtime rules.
subcategories.conservative_view: Mandated wage floors and benefit requirements price low-skilled workers out of the market and burden small businesses.
subcategories.liberal_view: Federal minimum wage increases and mandated paid family leave are necessary baseline protections for all workers.

subcategories.name: Workplace Safety & Standards
subcategories.description: OSHA regulations, discrimination in employment, worker classification.
subcategories.conservative_view: Flexible labor arrangements (like gig work) benefit workers; avoid overly burdensome safety compliance that stifles business.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strict enforcement of workplace safety, protections against discrimination, and preventing the misclassification of employees.

political_categories.name: Healthcare
political_categories.description: Healthcare coverage, costs, public health, and regulation.
political_categories.conservative_view: Market-based solutions, personal responsibility, choice in coverage, and competition to drive down costs and improve quality.
political_categories.liberal_view: Healthcare as a human right requiring universal access, government role in ensuring affordability, and public health prioritization.

subcategories.name: Coverage Models
subcategories.description: Universal healthcare vs private insurance systems.
subcategories.conservative_view: Private insurance and market competition provide better quality, choice, and efficiency than government-run systems.
subcategories.liberal_view: Universal healthcare ensures everyone gets care regardless of ability to pay, reducing costs through collective bargaining.

subcategories.name: Costs & Access
subcategories.description: Drug pricing, insurance affordability, billing transparency.
subcategories.conservative_view: Market competition and price transparency will naturally reduce costs; government price controls stifle medical innovation.
subcategories.liberal_view: Government intervention, like Medicare negotiating drug prices, is needed to control excessive pricing and ensure affordability.

subcategories.name: Public & Mental Health
subcategories.description: Pandemic response, vaccinations, suicide prevention, parity laws.
subcategories.conservative_view: Individual choice in health decisions; private sector innovation and community support address mental health best.
subcategories.liberal_view: Government coordination is necessary to protect public health; state funding ensures mental health treatment is accessible.

subcategories.name: Reproductive Health
subcategories.description: Abortion policy, contraception access, maternal care.
subcategories.conservative_view: Protection of unborn life, religious freedom for providers, and traditional family values guide reproductive policy.
subcategories.liberal_view: Women's bodily autonomy, reproductive choice, and universal access to family planning services.

political_categories.name: Education
political_categories.description: Policies governing schools, universities, and student support.
political_categories.conservative_view: School choice, parental rights, local control, merit-based advancement, and traditional educational values.
political_categories.liberal_view: Equitable public education funding, inclusive curriculum, teacher support, and addressing systemic educational inequalities.

subcategories.name: K-12 Education
subcategories.conservative_view: Local control, parental oversight of curriculum, merit pay for teachers, and emphasis on core academic subjects.
subcategories.liberal_view: Adequate federal/state funding, professional teacher compensation, inclusive curriculum, and addressing achievement gaps.

subcategories.name: Higher Education
subcategories.description: Student loans, tuition, public university funding.
subcategories.conservative_view: Personal responsibility for education costs; reduced government subsidies that inflate tuition prices.
subcategories.liberal_view: Accessible higher education through public funding, loan forgiveness, and treating education as a public investment.

subcategories.name: School Choice
subcategories.conservative_view: Competition improves education quality; parents should have the funding to choose schools that align with their values.
subcategories.liberal_view: Public schools need support, not diversion of funds to private entities; school choice can increase segregation.

political_categories.name: Infrastructure & Transportation
political_categories.description: Development of physical and digital infrastructure.
political_categories.conservative_view: Private sector efficiency, user fees for infrastructure, limited government role, focus on core infrastructure needs like roads.
political_categories.liberal_view: Major public investment in infrastructure as an economic stimulus, job creator, and means to ensure equitable access.

subcategories.name: Transportation
subcategories.conservative_view: User fees and private sector involvement; focus on maintaining roads and highways over heavily subsidized mass transit.
subcategories.liberal_view: Public investment in mass transit, high-speed rail, and sustainable transportation options to reduce emissions.

subcategories.name: Digital Infrastructure
subcategories.conservative_view: Private sector-led broadband expansion; market competition should drive access and reduce costs.
subcategories.liberal_view: Government investment needed to ensure universal broadband access as a utility, especially in rural and urban areas.

subcategories.name: Public Works & Utilities
subcategories.description: Water systems, electricity grid, waste management.
subcategories.conservative_view: Private utility management where possible, user fees for services, efficient delivery through market mechanisms.
subcategories.liberal_view: Public utilities ensure universal access and affordability; government must invest in modern, resilient infrastructure.

political_categories.name: Environment & Energy
political_categories.description: Natural resource policy, energy production, climate change response, and disaster management.
political_categories.conservative_view: Balanced approach prioritizing economic growth, energy independence, private property rights, and market-based solutions.
political_categories.liberal_view: Aggressive climate action, renewable energy transition, and environmental protection over short-term economic interests.

subcategories.name: Climate Policy
subcategories.description: Emissions limits, carbon pricing, green incentives.
subcategories.conservative_view: Market-based technological innovation; avoiding economic disruption or job losses while addressing environmental concerns.
subcategories.liberal_view: Urgent government action on climate change through strict regulation, carbon pricing, and rapid transition mandates.

subcategories.name: Energy Production
subcategories.description: Fossil fuels, nuclear power, renewable energy.
subcategories.conservative_view: All-of-the-above strategy including domestic fossil fuels and nuclear to ensure energy independence and low costs.
subcategories.liberal_view: Rapid transition to renewable energy sources, phasing out fossil fuel subsidies, and heavy government investment in clean tech.

subcategories.name: Conservation & Water
subcategories.description: Public lands, wildlife, water rights, pollution control.
subcategories.conservative_view: Balanced use of natural resources for economic benefit; respect for private property and existing water rights.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong environmental protection, expansion of protected federal lands, and prioritizing conservation over resource extraction.

subcategories.name: Disaster Management
subcategories.conservative_view: State and local primary responsibility with efficient federal support; personal responsibility for preparedness.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong federal disaster response, climate change adaptation funding, and ensuring equitable recovery assistance.

political_categories.name: Science & Technology
political_categories.description: Regulation of digital platforms, scientific research, space exploration, and emerging tech.
political_categories.conservative_view: Light regulation to promote innovation, free speech online, private sector space leadership, and American technological dominance.
political_categories.liberal_view: Strong regulation to protect data privacy, prevent algorithmic bias, fund public research, and ensure tech serves the public good.

subcategories.name: Data Privacy & Cybersecurity
subcategories.conservative_view: Market-based privacy solutions; public-private partnerships for cyber defense without heavy compliance burdens.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong federal data protection laws, user rights over personal information, and strict cybersecurity mandates for infrastructure.

subcategories.name: Tech Regulation & Speech
subcategories.conservative_view: Protect free speech online; skeptical of content moderation by Big Tech that may silence conservative viewpoints.
subcategories.liberal_view: Platform responsibility to combat misinformation and hate speech while protecting legitimate expression.

subcategories.name: Emerging Tech & AI
subcategories.conservative_view: Light regulatory touch to maintain American innovation leadership against foreign adversaries.
subcategories.liberal_view: Proactive regulation to ensure AI safety, prevent algorithmic discrimination, and manage workforce displacement.

subcategories.name: Space & Scientific Research
subcategories.conservative_view: Commercialization of space; government R&D should focus primarily on national security and basic research.
subcategories.liberal_view: Robust public funding for scientific institutions; space exploration as a peaceful public good.

political_categories.name: Agriculture & Rural Issues
political_categories.description: Policies affecting farmers, food safety, and rural economies.
political_categories.conservative_view: Support for farming autonomy, minimal environmental regulation, market-based solutions, and preserving rural property rights.
political_categories.liberal_view: Sustainable agriculture, farm worker protections, strict environmental standards, and support for small farmers over agribusiness.

subcategories.name: Farm Policy
subcategories.conservative_view: Support for agricultural producers through crop insurance while reducing the EPA regulatory burden on family farms.
subcategories.liberal_view: Farm subsidies should be restructured to support sustainable practices, conservation, and small local farms rather than corporate agribusiness.

subcategories.name: Food Safety
subcategories.conservative_view: Science-based safety regulations without alarmism; support for agricultural innovation including GMOs; minimal labeling burdens.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong FDA/USDA oversight, aggressive consumer right-to-know through labeling, and a precautionary approach to new food technologies.

subcategories.name: Rural Development
subcategories.description: Infrastructure and healthcare access for rural areas.
subcategories.conservative_view: Market-based rural development; empowering local communities to manage their own economic growth without federal mandates.
subcategories.liberal_view: Targeted federal investment to prevent rural hospital closures and ensure equitable access to economic opportunities.

political_categories.name: Criminal Justice
political_categories.description: Approach to crime, punishment, policing, and the justice system.
political_categories.conservative_view: Tough on crime, strong support for law enforcement, serious consequences for criminals, and prioritizing victims' rights.
political_categories.liberal_view: Reform the system, address root causes of crime, emphasize rehabilitation, and reduce mass incarceration.

subcategories.name: Sentencing & Punishment
subcategories.description: Prison terms, mandatory minimums, death penalty.
subcategories.conservative_view: Serious crimes deserve serious punishment; strong sentences deter crime and incapacitate dangerous repeat offenders.
subcategories.liberal_view: Mass incarceration is ineffective and unjust; reduce sentences, eliminate mandatory minimums, and abolish the death penalty.

subcategories.name: Policing & Law Enforcement
subcategories.conservative_view: Support and fully fund police; officers need qualified immunity and discretion to safely handle dangerous situations.
subcategories.liberal_view: Reform policing through strict accountability, demilitarization, independent oversight, and addressing systemic bias.

subcategories.name: Rehabilitation & Drug Policy
subcategories.conservative_view: Punishment is the primary goal; maintain strong drug enforcement while offering voluntary treatment options.
subcategories.liberal_view: Decriminalize minor drug offenses; treat addiction as a health issue; invest heavily in reentry and rehabilitation programs.

political_categories.name: Civil Rights & Social Issues
political_categories.description: Civil liberties, discrimination, family policy, and cultural values.
political_categories.conservative_view: Traditional values, religious freedom, colorblind legal equality without special preferences, and preservation of established social norms.
political_categories.liberal_view: Active social justice, protection of marginalized groups, LGBTQ+ rights, and addressing systemic historical inequities.

subcategories.name: Civil Rights & Equity
subcategories.conservative_view: Equal opportunity and treatment under the law; opposition to identity politics and race-conscious policies.
subcategories.liberal_view: Active measures, including affirmative action and diversity initiatives, are needed to combat systemic discrimination.

subcategories.name: Family, Culture & Religion
subcategories.description: Marriage policy, gender identity, religious liberties.
subcategories.conservative_view: Protection of traditional family structures, biological reality in gender policy, and robust religious exemptions in public life.
subcategories.liberal_view: Marriage equality, comprehensive LGBTQ+ rights, gender identity recognition, and secular governance.

subcategories.name: Privacy & Civil Liberties
subcategories.conservative_view: Balance civil liberties with the need for law enforcement to maintain order and protect national security.
subcategories.liberal_view: Robust privacy protections, strict limits on government surveillance, and absolute defense of individual civil liberties.

subcategories.name: Tribal & Indigenous Affairs
subcategories.description: Native American sovereignty, treaty rights, cultural preservation.
subcategories.conservative_view: Respect for tribal sovereignty balanced with federal/state authority; focus on indigenous economic self-reliance.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strict honoring of historical treaty obligations, strong support for tribal self-determination, and restorative justice for historical harms.

political_categories.name: Immigration
political_categories.description: Comprehensive approach to border security, legal immigration, and asylum.
political_categories.conservative_view: Strict border enforcement, merit-based legal immigration, deterrence of illegal entry, and prioritizing American workers.
political_categories.liberal_view: A humane system with pathways to citizenship for undocumented residents, family reunification, and robust refugee protection.

subcategories.name: Border Security & Enforcement
subcategories.conservative_view: Secure the border with physical barriers and increased personnel; strictly enforce deportation laws to deter illegal crossings.
subcategories.liberal_view: Focus on smart border technology; limit interior ICE raids; treat unauthorized border crossings as civil rather than criminal offenses.

subcategories.name: Legal Immigration & Pathways
subcategories.conservative_view: Transition to a skills-based system; oppose blanket amnesty which rewards lawbreaking.
subcategories.liberal_view: Provide a permanent pathway to citizenship for Dreamers and undocumented populations; expand legal visa caps.

subcategories.name: Asylum & Refugees
subcategories.conservative_view: Tighten asylum rules to prevent systemic abuse; limit overall refugee admissions to ensure thorough security vetting.
subcategories.liberal_view: Restore and expand asylum processes; generous refugee admissions reflect American humanitarian values.

political_categories.name: Defense & National Security
political_categories.description: Funding and deployment of the armed forces, military strategy, and veterans affairs.
political_categories.conservative_view: Peace through strength; robust military funding, modernization of the nuclear triad, and decisive lethal capability.
political_categories.liberal_view: Measured military spending, focus on asymmetric threats like cyber warfare, and reliance on diplomacy before force.

subcategories.name: Military Readiness & Budget
subcategories.conservative_view: Consistent increases in defense spending are required to maintain global supremacy and deter near-peer adversaries.
subcategories.liberal_view: The defense budget is bloated and should be audited; funds should be reallocated to domestic priorities and diplomacy.

subcategories.name: Veterans Affairs
subcategories.conservative_view: Expand private healthcare choices for veterans to bypass VA wait times; ensure strong transition assistance to civilian life.
subcategories.liberal_view: Fully fund and staff the VA system as a public healthcare model; expand benefits for toxic exposure and mental health.

subcategories.name: Intelligence & Counterterrorism
subcategories.conservative_view: Provide intelligence agencies with the broad authorities and surveillance tools necessary to prevent terrorist attacks.
subcategories.liberal_view: Ensure strict congressional oversight of intelligence agencies to prevent abuses of power and constitutional violations.

political_categories.name: Foreign Policy
political_categories.description: International diplomacy, global trade, foreign aid, and geopolitical alliances.
political_categories.conservative_view: America First approach; bilateral agreements over multilateral constraints; skepticism of international organizations.
political_categories.liberal_view: Multilateral cooperation; strengthening international institutions; prioritizing human rights and global stability.

subcategories.name: International Alliances & Treaties
subcategories.conservative_view: Alliances must serve US interests and partners must pay their fair share; avoid treaties that surrender US sovereignty.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong alliances multiply American influence; active participation in the UN and global accords is essential for solving global crises.

subcategories.name: Global Trade & Tariffs
subcategories.conservative_view: Use tariffs aggressively to protect domestic manufacturing and punish unfair foreign trade practices; favor bilateral trade deals.
subcategories.liberal_view: Free trade generally benefits the global economy, but agreements must include strict labor and environmental standards.

subcategories.name: Foreign Aid & Diplomacy
subcategories.conservative_view: Foreign aid should be highly restricted and explicitly tied to US strategic objectives, not open-ended nation building.
subcategories.liberal_view: Robust funding for the State Department and foreign aid promotes global stability, addresses poverty, and prevents conflicts.

political_categories.name: Government Operations & Reform
political_categories.description: Rules and systems shaping elections, the balance of power, and institutional integrity.
political_categories.conservative_view: Limited federal power, strong states' rights, constitutional originalism, and strict election security measures.
political_categories.liberal_view: Expansion of voting access, federal protection of civil rights, campaign finance reform, and modernization of democratic institutions.

subcategories.name: Electoral Law & Voting
subcategories.conservative_view: Election integrity requires strict voter ID, accurate rolls, and state control over election procedures.
subcategories.liberal_view: Expand voting access through federal standards, automatic registration, and independent redistricting commissions.

subcategories.name: Campaign Finance & Ethics
subcategories.conservative_view: Political spending is a form of protected free speech; arbitrary limits on campaign contributions are unconstitutional.
subcategories.liberal_view: Aggressive campaign finance reform is needed to limit corporate influence, including support for public campaign financing.

subcategories.name: Federalism & Executive Power
subcategories.conservative_view: Decentralize power to the states; rein in the unelected administrative state; the executive must strictly follow the Constitution.
subcategories.liberal_view: Strong federal authority is needed to ensure equal protection nationwide; expert administrative agencies are vital for complex governance.
